content:
# Swishy website reveal templates - Overview

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: landing page entry, product reveal, dashboard first load, portfolio hero, SaaS demo
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

Visual traits:
- blur-in
- ease from bottom
- website reveal
- soft depth
- launch animation

Use when:
- landing page entry
- product reveal
- dashboard first load
- portfolio hero
- SaaS demo

Avoid when:
- frequent route changes
- admin workflow repeated every click
- low-end mobile heavy page

AI summary: Use website reveal blur for premium page entry: background glow, glass panels, and controls rise from below while blur resolves, with 600-900ms duration and reduced-motion fallback.

# Swishy website reveal templates - Layout Rules

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: landing page entry, product reveal, dashboard first load, portfolio hero, SaaS demo
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

- Reveal the shell first, then primary content, then secondary cards and controls.
- Use blur and vertical translation for a premium first-load effect, but settle within about one second.
- Stagger cards and controls so the page feels assembled rather than dumped onto the screen.

AI summary: Use website reveal blur for premium page entry: background glow, glass panels, and controls rise from below while blur resolves, with 600-900ms duration and reduced-motion fallback.

# Swishy website reveal templates - Accessibility Notes

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: landing page entry, product reveal, dashboard first load, portfolio hero, SaaS demo
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

- Keep content available in DOM immediately.
- Under reduced motion, use a short fade without blur/translation.
- Avoid making users wait for essential navigation.

AI summary: Use website reveal blur for premium page entry: background glow, glass panels, and controls rise from below while blur resolves, with 600-900ms duration and reduced-motion fallback.

# Swishy website reveal templates - Implementation Hints

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: landing page entry, product reveal, dashboard first load, portfolio hero, SaaS demo
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

- Use opacity 0 to 1, translateY 24-48px to 0, blur 12px to 0px, duration 600-900ms.
- Use staggered delays of 80-140ms for card groups.
- For Liquid Glass pages, reveal background glow first, then glass panels, then inner controls.

AI summary: Use website reveal blur for premium page entry: background glow, glass panels, and controls rise from below while blur resolves, with 600-900ms duration and reduced-motion fallback.
